series_metadata.series_description: Dismissed Action: ethics grievance not certified to a formal action; Grievance received; conditionally dismissed and not reopened.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 5 years - For conditional dismissals, retain electronic medium for a period of 5 years from the date of dismissal; then, delete electronic medium. (This does not apply to a conditional dismissal that is reopened.) ; Paper: 5 years - For conditional dismissals, retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 5 years from the date of dismissal; then, shred physical file. (This does not apply to a conditional dismissal that is reopened.), Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
